prompt: Create a dynamic streetwear character poster on a white background with teal and gold paint-splatter brush strokes. The main subject is one anthropomorphic panda standing full body in a confident three-quarter pose, looking to the side, with one hand in a pocket and the other holding one ornate vertical staff/cane decorated with gold-and-teal geometric glyphs. The character wears a dramatic Aztec/Mesoamerican-inspired feather headdress in teal, emerald, navy, black, and gold, a gold ceremonial forehead mask ornament, layered turquoise-and-gold jewelry, a black oversized bomber jacket with gold patches and teal trim, a white graphic T-shirt printed with a stylized ancient mask face, loose black cargo pants with teal straps and gold side detailing, chunky green-black-white sneakers, gloves, and one small teal crossbody pouch with a golden mask emblem. Add a visible fluffy black-white-teal tail behind the legs. The composition includes exactly 3 large brush-lettered words on the left reading “BUILDING ON XAHAU”, with “BUILDING” and “XAHAU” in dark teal and “ON” in metallic gold; place the text diagonally and make it look hand-painted with splashes. On the right background, include one large thin white line-art mask illustration over a dark teal brush-stroke panel. Use high-contrast comic/anime concept art styling, sharp ink outlines, energetic splatter effects, detailed fabric folds, gold highlights, and a premium crypto-street-culture aesthetic.
